interface: You may enter before the mind has reached full speed.

audit.notes: Mechanism: normalizes sleep inertia and partial readiness after waking; source: Wertz et al., 'Effects of sleep inertia on cognition,' JAMA (2006), doi:10.1001/jama.295.2.163.

zh-TW.interface: 你可以在腦袋還沒全速之前進入。

zh-CN.interface: 你可以在脑子还没全速之前进入。

ja.kernel: 覚醒は部分的でもよいです。
ja.interface: 頭がまだ全速でなくても入れます。

design_rationale: Gap filled: pre-morning entries currently do not cover groggy threshold states. Research basis: sleep inertia temporarily reduces cognition after waking, so the permission reframes partial readiness as normal rather than deficient. Expected app context: user opens Maida very early, feels not-ready, and benefits from a low-demand entry condition.

interface: You may open this without turning the first hour into a test.

audit.notes: Mechanism: lowers self-judgment around imperfect starts using self-compassion/common-humanity framing; source: Neff, 'Self-Compassion: An Alternative Conceptualization of a Healthy Attitude Toward Oneself' (2003), doi:10.1080/15298860309032.

zh-TW.interface: 你可以在不把第一個小時變成測驗的情況下打開。

zh-CN.interface: 你可以在不把第一个小时变成测验的情况下打开。

ja.interface: 最初の一時間をテストにしなくても開けます。

design_rationale: Gap filled: existing entries reduce generic obligation but not morning ambition pressure. Research basis: self-compassion reduces harsh self-evaluation after imperfect performance, so the copy removes the sense that the day must start correctly. Expected app context: user opens the launcher in a productivity-charged morning and needs permission not to treat leisure entry as a verdict on the day.

interface: You may use a lower-focus hour without treating it as a failure.

audit.notes: Mechanism: normalizes the midafternoon drop in alertness as circadian rather than personal failure; source: Monk, 'The post-lunch dip in performance,' Clin Sports Med (2005), doi:10.1016/j.csm.2004.12.002.

zh-TW.interface: 你可以在專注較低的時段使用，不把它當成失敗。

zh-CN.interface: 你可以在专注较低的时段使用，不把它当成失败。

ja.kernel: 鋭さは自然に下がります。
ja.interface: 集中が低い時間帯でも、それを失敗にしなくて使えます。

design_rationale: Gap filled: the library currently has no prescription for the familiar afternoon slump. Research basis: the post-lunch dip is a documented circadian phenomenon, so the permission works by normalizing reduced sharpness instead of moralizing it. Expected app context: user checks Maida during a dull workday or midday lull and benefits from a softer threshold for entry.

interface: You may enter without closing every loop the day left behind.

audit.notes: Mechanism: lowers completion pressure at the work-to-leisure boundary using psychological detachment framing; source: Sonnentag and Bayer, 'Switching off mentally: predictors and consequences of psychological detachment from work during off-job time' (2005), doi:10.1037/1076-8998.10.4.393.

zh-TW.interface: 你可以在不先結清一天遺留事項的情況下進入。

zh-CN.interface: 你可以在不先结清一天遗留事项的情况下进入。

ja.kernel: 区切りは保留でもよいです。
ja.interface: 一日に残った用件を全部閉じなくても入れます。

design_rationale: Gap filled: there is no evening-specific permission for unfinished-day residue. Research basis: psychological detachment supports recovery, so the prescription removes the felt requirement to complete every open loop before leisure. Expected app context: user arrives after work or chores and hesitates because the day still feels administratively unfinished.

interface: You may open the launcher without owing the night a full session.

audit.notes: Mechanism: reduces all-or-nothing commitment pressure in the time window associated with bedtime procrastination and self-regulation conflict; source: Kroese et al., 'Bedtime procrastination: introducing a new area of procrastination,' Front Psychol (2014), doi:10.3389/fpsyg.2014.00611.

zh-TW.interface: 你可以打開啟動器，而不需要讓夜晚承擔完整的一次遊玩。

zh-CN.interface: 你可以打开启动器，而不需要让夜晚承担完整的一次游玩。

ja.kernel: 短い立ち寄りでも完結します。
ja.interface: ランチャーを開いても、夜にフルセッションを負わせる必要はありません。

design_rationale: Gap filled: the set lacks a late-night prescription for guilt and commitment inflation. Research basis: bedtime procrastination is a self-regulation conflict, so the permission lowers stakes by making entry nonbinding rather than totalizing. Expected app context: user opens Maida late, feels the tension between rest and leisure, and benefits from permission that does not turn opening into an obligation to stay.
